title: TMKOC's Jethalal aka Dilip Joshi gifts 'Fafda Jalebi' to Olympic winner Aman Sehrawat and fans have the best reaction
description: TMKOC's Jethalal, played by Dilip Joshi, meets Olympic bronze medalist Aman Sehrawat and gifts him 'Fafda Jalebi.' Fans are thrilled by the interaction between the two legends.
